promotions.title: First Remittance to Chinese Mainland: 0 Fees
promotions.highlight: 💰 Zero handling fee on first transfer to Chinese Mainland
promotions.description: Log in to the Airstar Bank App and use 'Remit to Chinese Mainland·WeRemit' to enjoy zero handling fee on your first transfer. Funds can be received as soon as 1 hour after transfer.
promotions.quota: One-time offer per customer. Limited quota, first come, first served

promotions.title: Activate Money Safe, Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: ☕ Free HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher when activating Money Safe
promotions.description: Deposit any amount into a 'Money Safe' account to receive a HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher. Money Safe is an anti-fraud feature that offers protection while still earning the same Savings/Time Deposit interest rates.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served

promotions.title: Visa Flight Booking Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to $800 cash rebate on eligible flight bookings
promotions.description: Visa cardholders can enjoy cash rebates when using their Registered Eligible Visa Card to pay for air tickets booked with Air New Zealand, ANA, Ethiopian Airlines, EVA AIR or Singapore Airlines via their designated official Hong Kong or Macau websites.
promotions.quota: One-time maximum $800 cash rebate reward per eligible cardholder

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer 24/7 Service
promotions.highlight: ⚡ 24/7 instant transfers in HKD, USD, and CNY
promotions.description: Supports securities transfers in HKD, USD, and CNY currencies with 24/7 availability and instant arrival. Transfer your funds seamlessly between accounts with immediate processing.

promotions.title: Lifetime $0 Commissions on HK Stocks
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Invest with as little as 1 HK share or US$5 for US stocks
promotions.description: Start investing with just 1 share for Hong Kong stocks or as little as US$5 for US stocks through fractional share investing. Lower the barrier to entry for diversified stock investing.

promotions.title: Money Safe Anti-Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection against fraud while earning interest
promotions.description: Money Safe feature provides enhanced protection against fraud losses. Secure your funds while still earning Savings or Time Deposit rates, with funds only unlockable through in-person appointment.

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 5 minutes via mobile
promotions.description: Supports Hong Kong Residents and Visitors in Hong Kong to open accounts via mobile phone. The entire process can be completed in as little as 5 minutes without visiting a branch.
promotions.quota: Available to all Hong Kong residents and visitors physically present in Hong Kong

promotions.title: No Account Management Fees
promotions.highlight: 💼 Zero account management fees and no minimum balance required
promotions.description: Enjoy free of charge services with no account management fees and no minimum deposit balance requirement. Maintain your account without worrying about monthly fees or minimum balance penalties.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💸 Loan amount up to 12x monthly salary with personalized APR
promotions.description: Personal loans with customized interest rates ranging from 7.43% to 35.05% APR. Total loan amount up to 12 times of monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower) with loan disbursement as fast as 5 minutes.
promotions.quota: Subject to eligibility and credit assessment

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 No minimum balance requirement with multi-currency support
promotions.description: Savings account with no minimum balance requirement and support for multiple currencies. Keep funds in various currencies in a single account for convenient management.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposits
promotions.highlight: ⏰ 24/7 time deposit placement with flexible tenors
promotions.description: Place time deposits anytime with 24/7 service and flexible tenor options. Manage your time deposits conveniently through the app without time restrictions.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Transfer Options
promotions.highlight: 📲 Versatile transfer methods with 24/7 instant FPS transfers
promotions.description: Supports transfers in multiple currencies (HKD, USD, CNY, etc.) via mobile numbers, email addresses, or account numbers. Features 24/7 instant transfers for HKD and CNY through FPS.

promotions.title: eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) Interest Rate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2.0% p.a. interest on your savings!
promotions.description: Customers who successfully upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) through the AlipayHK App can enjoy up to 2.0% p.a. interest. The 2.0% rate applies to deposit amounts between HKD 200,000-800,000, while the first HKD 200,000 earns 0.5% p.a.
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD 200,000 deposit to enjoy 2.0% rate

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Get up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on your first withdrawal!
promotions.description: SME customers can receive a cash rebate of up to HKD 100,000 when making their first loan withdrawal. This is a limited-time promotion for business customers applying for SME loans.
promotions.cost: Must apply for and draw down an SME loan

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Support for HKD, RMB, and USD currencies in one account!
promotions.description: The savings account has been upgraded to multi-currency, supporting HKD, RMB, and USD. Account holders can now transfer directly from Libra Savings to third-party accounts with daily transfer limits of up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform Zero Fee Offer
promotions.highlight: 🏦 Zero fees for both subscription and redemption of funds!
promotions.description: With the new Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform, customers can enjoy zero fees for both fund subscription and redemption. The platform charges no platform fees and offers minimum investment amounts as low as HKD 1.

promotions.title: Insurance Product with 3.6% Annual Rate
promotions.highlight: 💯 Get 100% rebate on your insurance premium!
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy a 100% rebate on their insurance premium when purchasing eligible insurance products through Ant Bank. The bank offers simple online procedures for insurance application with quality protection options.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Trade stocks with zero commission fees!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers zero commission on securities trading, allowing customers to trade Hong Kong and US stocks more cost-effectively. This promotion is part of their one-stop securities trading service with bank-level wealth management.
promotions.cost: Free, subject to terms and conditions

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit No Penalty for Early Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open your account in as fast as 3 minutes!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a fast account opening experience that can take as little as 3 minutes. This feature makes it convenient for customers to open investment accounts quickly without income proof documents.

promotions.title: Fastee Secure Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced security for your deposits with anti-fraud measures!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Fastee Secure Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The service allows customers to lock spare deposits that cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.

promotions.title: One-Stop Securities Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks on a single platform!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, providing global investment opportunities. The platform gives access to Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment solutions.
promotions.cost: Trading fees apply as per service charge schedule

promotions.title: Time Deposit with Early Withdrawal Without Penalty
promotions.highlight: 💸 Withdraw your time deposit early with no penalty fees!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposit products with customizable deposit periods and no penalty for early withdrawal of the entire deposit. The service supports HKD and USD deposits with a minimum deposit amount of just HKD 1.

promotions.title: Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in just 5 minutes with HKID and mobile number
promotions.description: Open a bank account quickly with just your Hong Kong ID card and mobile number. The entire process takes as little as 5 minutes, faster than preparing a cup of coffee.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong identity card holders aged 18 or above, non-US persons only

promotions.title: Start Saving from HKD 1
promotions.highlight: 💰 Start saving with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Flexible savings plan that allows customers to start with as little as HKD 1. Designed to help customers save for their next adventure or personal milestone.

promotions.title: Local Transfers in Multiple Currencies
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Transfer money in HKD, CNY, and USD locally
promotions.description: Instant transfers in multiple currencies including HKD, CNY, and USD to other local accounts. This service makes foreign exchange simpler and more accessible for customers.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Service
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Send money globally from your smartphone
promotions.description: Send and receive money globally through your smartphone. Customers can buy foreign currency with real-time exchange rates and send it out or connect to payment networks for cashless spending worldwide.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection up to HKD 800,000
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Eligible deposits protected up to HKD 800,000
promotions.description: Fusion Bank is a licensed digital bank in Hong Kong and a member of Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme. All eligible deposits are protected up to a maximum of HKD 800,000 per depositor.

promotions.title: Foreign Exchange Rewards Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💱 Special rewards for foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: Promotion offering special rewards for customers who exchange foreign currencies. Includes options for USD, HKD, and RMB exchanges with no upper limit on exchange amounts.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Time Deposit Interest Rate Boost
promotions.highlight: 🔼 Enhanced interest rates for foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Special promotion offering boosted interest rates for time deposits in foreign currencies. Available for customers exchanging currencies and placing them in time deposits.

promotions.title: Flash Monday High-Interest HKD Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ⚡ High-interest HKD time deposits on Mondays
promotions.description: Special high-interest rate time deposit promotion for HKD savings available on Mondays. Flash Monday offers enhanced returns on time deposits for a limited period.

promotions.title: Savings Interest Plus
promotions.highlight: ➕ Enhanced interest rates for savings accounts
promotions.description: Special promotion offering increased interest rates for savings account holders. Provides customers with better returns on their deposits for a promotional period.

promotions.title: liviSave Special Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn preferential savings rate with no minimum deposit
promotions.description: liviSave offers a special preferential savings interest rate for customers who deposit funds into their account. No minimum deposit is required to enjoy this special rate, making it accessible to all customers.

promotions.title: liviSave No-Fee Account
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no fees and no minimum deposit requirements. The account serves both paying and saving needs, offering complete flexibility for customers' everyday banking.

promotions.title: Fast and Free FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Instant free transfers anytime with FPS
promotions.description: Enjoy fast and free transfers to anyone at any time using the Faster Payment System (FPS). The service allows customers to make instant money transfers without any transaction fees.

promotions.title: QR Payment Service
promotions.highlight: 📱 Fast and secure QR payments across Hong Kong
promotions.description: Make payments using QR codes at merchants all across Hong Kong. The service offers a fast, convenient, and secure way to complete transactions at retail locations throughout the city.

promotions.title: 100% Online Account Opening
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Quick and easy fully digital account opening
promotions.description: Open a livi account 100% online through the app without complicated documentation. The process is quick and easy, allowing customers to complete account setup anytime and anywhere using their mobile device.

promotions.title: livi Rewards Program
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Exclusive rewards for everyday transactions
promotions.description: livi Rewards program offers various benefits and rewards for customers. The 'Happiness' and 'livi Rewards is here' mentions indicate an active rewards program that provides benefits for using livi services.

promotions.title: Pay your tax with Mox Credit Card, split and earn cash reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD500 cash reward when paying tax with Mox Credit Card
promotions.description: Pay your tax bill with Mox Credit Card and apply for Instalment during the promotional period. Spread the payment to ease financial pressure while earning up to HKD500 in cash rewards.

promotions.title: Tax Season Instant Loan with Low APR
promotions.highlight: 💸 Get an Instant Loan with APR as low as 1.18%
promotions.description: Apply for a Tax Season Instant Loan with APR as low as 1.18%. Get personalized quotation and instant disbursement through the Mox app for your tax payments.

promotions.title: Keeta Exclusive Flash Sale
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Enjoy up to HKD80 off orders on Keeta
promotions.description: Order from Keeta with your Mox Card and enjoy an exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off per order, saving up to HKD80 for the whole month. Also grab surprise vouchers and welcome rewards for your home party.
promotions.cost: Purchase on Keeta with Mox Card required

promotions.title: Mox x Xiaomi Flagship Camera Phone Offer
promotions.highlight: 📷 Earn up to 7% total cash rewards at Xiaomi + 0% Instalments
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or any Xiaomi Store with Mox Credit Card and unlock up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus up to 12-month 0% interest instalments. Combined with standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack for a total of up to 7% cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers only for additional HKD1,500 reward

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Scratch and win up to reward worth HKD8,888
promotions.description: Complete any of five simple challenges to get a Mox Scratch Card. Scratch and reveal prizes instantly, with the top prize being HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 SOL(s) (Solana) + HKD888 cash reward). Complete more challenges to increase chances of winning.

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Deposit your bonus and get a chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch'
promotions.description: Deposit your bonus into Mox to earn great interest and get a chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch'. For every HKD10,000 deposited, receive one entry into the lucky draw. Higher deposits increase chances of winning.

promotions.title: Mox x csl Best-in-Town Exclusive Plan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🤳 Get up to HKD1,380 Rebates + a Free NowTV Pass
promotions.description: Sign up for a new csl plan or renew your existing one with Mox Credit Card autopay to enjoy an HKD180 monthly fee rebate plus a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass (valued at HKD188).
promotions.cost: Sign up/renewal of csl plan with Mox Credit Card autopay

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Eggstra Care+ Promotion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Get 1 FREE add-on coverage with Travel Pick & Go insurance
promotions.description: Apply for Travel Pick & Go insurance during the promotional period to receive 1 FREE add-on coverage. This helps safeguard your trip from financial stress that unexpected events can bring.
promotions.cost: Purchase of Travel Pick & Go insurance required

promotions.title: MOXTRAVEL New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving
promotions.description: New customers who enter invitation code 'MOXTRAVEL' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving - enough for a round-trip flight to Asia.

promotions.title: Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Offer at The Club
promotions.highlight: 📱 Get HKD100 off the new Samsung S26 series at The Club
promotions.description: Spend HKD1,800 or more on The Club with Mox Credit Card and enter promo code CLUBMOX2026 to enjoy an instant HKD100 discount. This is on top of up to 2% Unlimited CashBack normally earned.

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Offer
promotions.highlight: 🚕 Get HKD10 off each Uber Taxi ride per month
promotions.description: Pay for your Uber Taxi rides with your Mox Card during the promotion period to enjoy HKD10 off each ride per month. Claim the exclusive promo code to enjoy the discount.
promotions.cost: Uber Taxi ride payment with Mox Card

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with Time Deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days, and maintain the balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers who haven't held any Mox Account in 12 months
promotions.cost: Minimum Time Deposit of HKD250,000 required

promotions.title: XM1500MOX New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 New customers earn up to HKD2,150 cash bonus
promotions.description: New customers who sign up with invitation code XM1500MOX can earn cash rewards worth up to HKD2,150. The offer is available when shopping at Xiaomi and combines with the Xiaomi spending offer.

promotions.title: MOXSMART Double Rewards Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💸 Earn 20% cash rebate from spendings across 5 hot merchants
promotions.description: New Mox customers who enter invitation code 'MOXSMART' when signing up can spend on their favorite merchants including HKTVmall, foodpanda, Uber, Keeta, or Taobao to earn a 20% cash rebate, plus additional rewards from savings.

promotions.title: MOXBILL26 HKT Bill Payment Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD1,200 cash rewards + up to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: Pay your HKT bills and earn HKD1,200 cash rewards plus up to 2% Unlimited CashBack. Specific requirements and eligibility period are not detailed in the source.

promotions.title: Trip.com Year-round Exclusive Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to 8% Off + Up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on Trip.com
promotions.description: Enjoy up to 8% off on Trip.com bookings plus earn up to 2% Unlimited CashBack when paying with Mox Credit Card. This is a year-round offer with no end date specified.
promotions.cost: Trip.com bookings with Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: Personal Accident Cushion Premium Rebate
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Enjoy up to 2 months of premium rebate
promotions.description: Get up to 2 months of premium rebate when purchasing Personal Accident Cushion insurance. The promotion doubles the reward, though specific eligibility criteria and period are not fully detailed in the source.
promotions.cost: Purchase of Personal Accident Cushion insurance required

promotions.title: Mox Payroll Benefits
promotions.highlight: 💸 Top up 1.5% p.a. on savings & Unlimited 2% CashBack on Mox Credit
promotions.description: Set up your payroll with Mox to receive a top-up of 1.5% p.a. on your savings and unlock Unlimited 2% CashBack on Mox Credit. This appears to be an ongoing feature with no end date.

promotions.title: Mission Bonus Rate
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Stack wins, stack rates – up to 3.5% p.a. on deposits
promotions.description: Complete missions to stack interest rates and earn up to 3.5% p.a. on your deposits. The specific missions and eligibility period are not fully detailed in the source.

promotions.title: Mox Referral Programme
promotions.highlight: 🎉 Earn HKD300 cash reward for each successful referral
promotions.description: Share your referral code with friends to invite them to open a Mox account. Both the referrer and referee earn HKD300 cash reward when the referee successfully opens an account, applies for Mox Credit Card, and completes HKD1,000 in eligible spending.
promotions.cost: Free to refer; referee must complete HKD1,000 eligible spending

promotions.title: CLUBLINK New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy rewards worth up to HKD1,400
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with invitation code 'CLUBLINK' to enjoy rewards worth up to HKD1,400. Specific requirements and rewards breakdown are not fully detailed in the source.

promotions.title: Mox Zone on The Club
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Enjoy year-round deals on The Club
promotions.description: Mox Zone is now available on The Club, offering year-round exclusive deals for Mox customers. This appears to be an ongoing feature with no end date.

promotions.title: Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn Asia Miles with Time Deposit
promotions.description: Place a Time Deposit with Mox to earn Asia Miles. The specific conversion rate and minimum deposit amount are not detailed in the source, but this appears to be an ongoing product feature.

promotions.title: FlexiBoost Savings
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy flexibility and competitive rates with FlexiBoost savings
promotions.description: FlexiBoost savings offers unmatched flexibility and competitive interest rates. This appears to be an ongoing product feature rather than a limited-time promotion.

promotions.title: New FX Users Reward
promotions.highlight: 💱 New FX users get up to HKD175 cash rewards
promotions.description: New users of Mox FX can get up to HKD175 in cash rewards. The specific requirements and eligibility period are not detailed in the source.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Rewards Scheme
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn 1 mile for every HKD4 spent with 0 Limits + 0% FX Fees
promotions.description: Use Mox Credit Card for all spending to earn 1 mile for every HKD4 spent with no limits and 0% foreign exchange fees. This is an ongoing product feature with no end date.
promotions.cost: Free to use Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Enjoy Unlimited CashBack with no restrictions
promotions.description: Use Mox Credit Card to earn Unlimited CashBack on all purchases with no category restrictions or spending caps. This is a permanent product feature rather than a limited-time promotion.
promotions.cost: Free to use Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: MOXHKT25 HKT Shopping Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get HKD1,400 Cash Rewards when shopping at HKT
promotions.description: Shop at HKT to get HKD1,400 in Cash Rewards. The specific requirements and eligibility period are not detailed in the source.

promotions.title: Instant Interest on Time Deposits
promotions.highlight: ⏱ Instant rewards for Time Deposit in cash or Asia Miles
promotions.description: Mox gives you rewards for your Time Deposit instantly, right at the moment you place it. Choose between cash or Asia Miles rewards immediately upon placing your Time Deposit.

promotions.title: 0% Interest Instant Clear
promotions.highlight: 💳 0% interest* on Instant Clear for credit card balance transfers
promotions.description: Clear your external credit card bills from other banks or financial institutions with Instant Clear and save as much as 94% interest charges. The process takes only a few minutes and offers 0% interest options.

promotions.title: Year-round offers with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Exclusive offers with Unlimited CashBack or Miles
promotions.description: Enjoy fabulous year-round offers when using your Mox Credit Card at partner merchants. Earn Unlimited CashBack or Unlimited Miles on all your spending throughout the year.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Daily Interest Calculation
promotions.highlight: 💸 Interest on savings calculated and credited to your account daily
promotions.description: Mox calculates and credits interest to your Mox Account daily, allowing your savings to grow faster. This is a permanent feature of Mox accounts with no end date or special eligibility requirements.

promotions.title: Mox Invest Trading Services
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade HK and US stocks including fractional shares with low fees
promotions.description: Mox is the first digital bank allowing customers to trade in both HK and US stocks, including fractional shares. Invest with low fees in stocks and funds with the security and advantages of a bank.

promotions.title: USD Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💵 1% p.a. interest on USD savings with no strings attached
promotions.description: Starting 1 March 2025, enjoy 1% p.a. interest on your USD savings with no strings attached. Interest is calculated and credited to your account daily, allowing you to watch your savings grow every day.

promotions.title: Mox Credit FPS Payments
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Pay with Mox Credit via FPS for transfers and bill payments
promotions.description: Use your Mox Credit to make payments via FPS, making daily transfers or paying bills effortlessly. This feature is automatically unlocked when your credit limit is approved, with no extra documents required.

promotions.title: Account Opening in 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Open a bank account quickly with Ping An Digital Bank, with the account opening process taking as little as 3 minutes. This feature is available to all customers with no minimum balance requirement.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💰 No minimum balance needed to maintain your account
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers accounts with no minimum balance requirement. Customers can maintain their accounts without worrying about fees or penalties related to minimum balances.

promotions.title: 24/7 Full Banking Capability
promotions.highlight: ⏰ Access banking services anytime with 24/7 availability
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers round-the-clock banking services through their mobile app. Customers can perform banking transactions and access services at any time of day.

promotions.title: Services for Residents and Visitors in Hong Kong
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Banking services available to both HK residents and visitors
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank provides banking services supporting both residents and visitors in Hong Kong. Visitors can access banking services when physically present in Hong Kong.

promotions.title: Low Investment Threshold for Money Market Funds
promotions.highlight: 🔍 Start investing with as little as USD 20 or HKD 100
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers low entry thresholds for money market fund investments. Customers can start investing with as little as USD 20 for USD-denominated funds or HKD 100 for HKD-denominated funds.

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stocks Trading with 0 Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 🇺🇸 Trade US stocks with no platform fees
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers US stock trading with no platform fees. Customers only pay USD 0.012 per share with a minimum of USD 7.88 per transaction, making US stock trading more cost-effective.
promotions.cost: USD 0.012 per share (min USD 7.88 per transaction)

promotions.title: Extended US Stock Trading Hours
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Trade US stocks for 16 hours daily with pre-market and after-hours trading
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers extended US stock trading hours including pre-market, regular market, and after-hours trading sessions. The total trading time spans 16 hours, giving customers more flexibility to trade based on their schedule.

promotions.title: Free Level 1 Hong Kong Stock Market Data
promotions.highlight: 📊 Access free real-time Level 1 market data for Hong Kong stocks
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank provides free Level 1 real-time market data for Hong Kong stocks to customers who have activated stock investment services. This includes unlimited real-time stock quotes to help investors make timely decisions.
promotions.quota: Available to customers with active stock investment services

promotions.title: Discounted Fund Subscription Fees
promotions.highlight: 💸 Lower fees for fund investments
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers competitive fund subscription fees: free for money market funds, 0.5% for bond funds, and 1% for mixed and equity funds.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Best Exchange Rates
promotions.highlight: 💱 Access the best exchange rates in town for foreign currencies
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers the best exchange rates in Hong Kong for foreign currency exchanges. Rates are compared with 28 retail banks in Hong Kong and are provided at cost price with no markup.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet $0 Foreign Currency Transaction Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 Pay $0 foreign currency transaction fees with WeLab debit card
promotions.description: WeLab Global Wallet debit card offers $0 foreign currency transaction fees for overseas transactions in 10 supported currencies (JPY, USD, CNY, AUD, GBP, EUR, SGD, CAD, CHF, NZD). Transactions are settled at WeLab Bank's current exchange rate without foreign exchange fees.
promotions.cost: Free with WeLab Global Wallet debit card

promotions.title: Easter Lucky Draw Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Win up to HKD1,000 travel vouchers with overseas spending
promotions.description: Use WeLab Global Wallet debit card for overseas transactions to earn lucky draw entries. 300 prizes are available including HKD1,000 travel vouchers. Overseas spending from April 1 also enjoys up to 3% cash rebate.
promotions.quota: No cap on lucky draw chances, must have at least one eligible transaction per round
promotions.cost: Any eligible transaction with WeLab Global Wallet debit card

promotions.title: Up to 3% Overseas Spending Cashback
promotions.highlight: 💳 Enjoy up to 3% cash rebate on overseas spending
promotions.description: Eligible cardholders can receive up to 3% cash rebate on overseas spending and up to 0.2% on local spending using WeLab Global Wallet debit card. Rebate will be automatically credited to core account by May 31, 2026.
promotions.quota: Maximum HKD50 rebate per eligible transaction
promotions.cost: Any eligible transaction with WeLab Global Wallet debit card

promotions.title: WeLab Bank 2-in-1 Welcome Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD5,000 cash rewards for new customers
promotions.description: New customers using promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy up to 4% p.a. time deposit rate plus HKD4,000 investment fund cash reward. Total rewards can reach approximately HKD5,000.
promotions.cost: Requires time deposit and fund investment

promotions.title: First-time Foreign Currency Exchange Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💱 Get HKD50 cash rebate on your first currency exchange
promotions.description: New foreign currency exchange customers who exchange HKD20,000 or more to any of the 10 designated popular foreign currencies in a single transaction can enjoy HKD50 cash rebate on their first exchange.
promotions.quota: First-time forex customers only, one-time offer

promotions.title: $0 Fund Subscription and Switching Fee
promotions.highlight: 💹 Enjoy $0 subscription and switching fees on all funds
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers unlimited $0 subscription and switching fees for all funds in their investment platform. This allows customers to flexibly allocate funds and build diversified passive income streams without incurring traditional transaction fees.
promotions.cost: 0.1% monthly platform fee based on fund holdings

promotions.title: Digital Wealth Advisory Service
promotions.highlight: 🤖 AI-powered investment advisory service
promotions.description: WeLab Bank partners with Allianz Global Investors to provide Digital Wealth Advisory services. The system helps customers set investment goals and provides portfolio recommendations based on individual circumstances and preferences.

promotions.title: Trip.com Discount with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Save up to HKD500 on Trip.com bookings
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy up to HKD500 discount when booking through Trip.com website or app using WeLab Global Wallet debit card. Must be a Trip.com member and enter designated promotion code at checkout.
promotions.period: Limited time offer, while supplies last
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come first served
promotions.cost: Booking of specified products with minimum spend (amount not specified)

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Personal Loan R Friends Referral Program
promotions.highlight: 👥 Earn HKD800 for each successful personal loan referral
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers can refer friends or relatives to apply for a WeLab Bank personal loan using their referral code. For each successful referral who draws down the loan within 7 days of approval, the referrer receives HKD800 cash reward.
promotions.quota: Maximum 10 successful referrals (HKD8,000) per customer during promotion period

promotions.title: Tesla Unsecured Loan Referral Reward
promotions.highlight: 🚘 Enjoy APR as low as 4.55% for Tesla customers
promotions.description: Tesla customers can apply for a personal installment loan with an APR as low as 4.55%. Available for loan amounts up to HKD1,500,000 or 18x monthly salary (whichever is lower). No collateral or prepayment amount required.
promotions.quota: Tesla customers only, limited quota, first come first served
promotions.cost: Must provide proof of Tesla vehicle subscription

promotions.title: 0.1% Monthly Fund Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💼 Low 0.1% monthly fee instead of traditional subscription fees
promotions.description: WeLab Bank charges a uniform monthly fee of 0.1% based on the total value of selected funds, helping customers save nearly 85% in transaction fees compared to traditional subscription fee models. This allows for unlimited trading and portfolio adjustments.
promotions.cost: 0.1% monthly platform fee based on fund value

promotions.title: New Customer Lucky Draw Bonus Entries
promotions.highlight: 🎰 New customers get 50 extra lucky draw entries
promotions.description: New customers automatically receive 50 additional lucky draw entries for the Easter promotion. These entries are in addition to regular entries earned through transactions and currency exchanges.

promotions.title: Personal Loan Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to HKD23,888 cash rebate with personal loan
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers who successfully apply for a personal loan and get approved for HKD150,001 or more with a repayment period of 24 months or more can enjoy up to HKD23,888 cash rebate. Must drawdown the loan within 7 days of approval.
promotions.quota: Must meet minimum loan amount and repayment period requirements
promotions.cost: Loan amount of HKD150,001 or above with 24+ month repayment term

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Fund Subscription Fee Offer
promotions.highlight: 🏦 0% subscription fees on ALL funds with no cap
promotions.description: ZA Bank retail banking users who have activated investment fund trading services can enjoy 0% fund subscription fee offer and redemption fee waivers for all funds until July 31, 2026. This allows 100% of your money to go into the market.

promotions.title: Customer Referral Program - Referrer Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🤝 Earn up to HKD 90,000 by referring friends to open ZA Bank accounts
promotions.description: During the promotion period, users can earn rewards by referring friends to open ZA Bank accounts. Top referrers in each of 9 stages can earn up to HKD 10,000, with additional rewards when referred friends meet deposit requirements.

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Reward and StockBack Bonus
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Open an account in as fast as 2-3 minutes with zero deposit requirement
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that can be completed in as little as 2-3 minutes. There is no minimum deposit requirement, and both Hong Kong residents and visitors can open accounts online.

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for Meeting Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💹 New users can enjoy 20% p.a. interest rate on 7-day HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers referred through the referral program can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate bonus coupon, which combined with the base rate offers a total of 20% p.a. interest rate. Additional coupons can be earned by meeting specified requirements.
promotions.cost: Must be referred through program and meet deposit requirements

promotions.title: StockBack x ZA Card Reward Program
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Earn stocks directly with your card spending instead of just points
promotions.description: Hong Kong's first StockBack program allows users to accumulate stocks through daily spending. For each eligible transaction of at least HKD 10, users can select one stock from six options to receive as cashback.

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Year-Round Travel Offers with ZA Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Exclusive travel discounts year-round for ZA Card users
promotions.description: ZA Card holders can access special year-round travel offers and discounts. This ongoing promotion provides travel benefits to cardholders at all times without seasonal restrictions.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 💱 Hold 11 different currencies in one account with 24/7 exchange
promotions.description: Users can hold 11 different currencies including HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, and CHF in a single account. This feature allows for flexible asset allocation with 24/7 currency exchange at preferred rates.

promotions.title: Free Cash Withdrawals at Visa ATMs
promotions.highlight: 💵 Free cash withdrawals at over 3,000 Visa ATMs across Hong Kong
promotions.description: ZA Card holders can withdraw cash for free at over 3,000 Visa ATMs throughout Hong Kong. This service provides convenient access to cash without incurring ATM withdrawal fees.

promotions.title: Crypto New Customer Platform Fee Waiver
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 crypto platform fee for new customers' first 90 days
promotions.description: New ZA Bank customers can enjoy zero platform fees for cryptocurrency trading during the first 90 days after account opening. This promotion allows new users to trade cryptocurrencies 24/7 directly with their HKD or USD deposits without paying platform fees.

promotions.title: Custom Card Number Selection
promotions.highlight: 🔢 First in Hong Kong to let you choose the last 6 digits on your card
promotions.description: ZA Bank is the first in Hong Kong to allow customers to personalize their debit cards by choosing the last 6 digits on the card face. This unique feature provides a personalized banking experience with a customized card number.
promotions.quota: Available to all ZA Card applicants

promotions.title: ZA Card No Annual Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 No annual fees or hidden charges on ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Bank's Visa debit card comes with no annual fees or hidden charges, providing a cost-effective payment solution. The card supports Apple Pay and Google Pay for convenient digital payments.

promotions.title: Free Instant FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Free and instant cross-bank transfers via FPS
promotions.description: Users can make free instant transfers between banks via FPS (Faster Payment System). This service allows receiving HKD and CNY with just a mobile phone number through FPS, with no fees charged.

promotions.title: Zero Fee SWIFT International Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Transfer to 140+ countries via SWIFT with zero ZA Bank fee
promotions.description: Users can make international transfers directly to over 140 countries and regions via SWIFT with no fees charged by ZA Bank. This service allows for global money transfers without the typical sending bank fees.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 24/7 Banking Service
promotions.highlight: ⏰ 24/7 banking services always available, no matter the time of day
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides around-the-clock banking services with 24x7 customer service support. Users can access banking features including deposits, transfers, and foreign exchange at any time without time restrictions.

promotions.title: Zero Brokerage and Custody Fees for Stocks
promotions.highlight: 📈 0 brokerage, 0 custody fees, and platform fee as low as USD 1.99/HKD 18
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers stock trading with zero brokerage fees and zero custody fees. Platform fees are as low as USD 1.99 for US stocks or HKD 18 per transaction for Hong Kong stocks, making trading more affordable.
promotions.cost: Platform fee only (USD 1.99 or HKD 18 minimum)

promotions.title: ZA Card PowerDraw
promotions.highlight: 🎯 Win up to 200% rebate on your spending through PowerDraw
promotions.description: ZA Card users can participate in PowerDraw when they spend with their card. Winners can receive up to 200% rebate on their purchases, offering significant rewards on everyday transactions.

promotions.title: Group Lai See Feature
promotions.highlight: 🧧 Send Group Lai See with one tap without entering recipients individually
promotions.description: Users can distribute Lai See (red packets) to groups with a single tap, eliminating the need to enter recipients individually. This convenient feature simplifies the traditional practice of sending red packets during holidays and special occasions.

promotions.title: ZA Bank x Wise Express Remittance
promotions.highlight: 🚀 HKD payments with express remittance by Wise arrive faster than standard transfers
promotions.description: ZA Bank partners with Wise to provide express remittance services, allowing HKD payments to arrive faster than standard international transfers. This service enables quicker cross-border payments for users.

promotions.title: Fast Loan Approval
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Loan approval results in as fast as 90 seconds with amounts up to HKD 1,000,000
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers fast loan approvals with results available in as little as 90 seconds. Loans are available for amounts up to HKD 1,000,000 with annualized percentage rates as low as 1.30%.

promotions.title: Insurance in 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Get insured in as fast as 3 minutes via your smartphone
promotions.description: In partnership with ZA Insure, users can complete insurance applications in as little as 3 minutes via smartphone. Coverage options include life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stock Trading Cashback
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to HKD 1,500 when opening an account and trading Hong Kong stocks
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 cash rewards for opening an account and up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when buying stocks. The promotion offers significant cash incentives for new stock trading customers.
